questionHtml: Distinguish between the distribution of activity in Saudi Arabia and the UK.
markschemeHtml:
1. higher mode for the number of steps in UK/4000 versus 3000 in Saudi Arabia;
  2. UK has more variation/is more spread out/greater standard deviation
    OR
    UK has a more normal distribution;
  3. people in UK take more steps than people in Saudi Arabia;

meta.title: Distinguish between the distribution of activity in Saudi Arabia and the UK.
